title: Chests Reforged
description: *This is a part of a major minecraft Resource Pack who I am making who will be called "Minecraft Reforged".* This Resource Pack changes the chests of the game to be more good looking.
body:
This Resource Pack changes chests of the game to be more good looking.

[**REQUIRES OPTIFINE**](https://optifine.net/downloads)

----

The chest, trapped chest and the ender chest get a new model.
And is possible to chanche the chest and trapped chest to 105 variations via renaming it on a anvil.

----

Renaming guide:

**The renaming isn't case sensible**

"Holding Structure":
- Iron
- Gold
- Netherite
- Copper
- Oxidated (is a oxidated version of the copper one)

Materials:
- Oak
- Spruce
- Birch
- Jungle
- Acacia
- Dark oak
- Mangove
- Cherry
- Bamboo
- Crimson
- Warped
- Nether Bricks
- Blackstone
- Deepslate
- Sandstone
- Stronghold (aka stone bricks)
- Prismarine
- Red Sand(aka red sandstone)
- End stone (aka end stone bricks)
- Tuff (aka tuff bricks)
- Pale Wood

----

{**This is a part of a major minecraft Resource Pack who I am making who will be called "Minecraft Reforged".**}

If you want to support me:
